name: credence-governor
description: Bayesian governance for coding agents — one engine-backed brain, thin per-harness adapters.

plugins.name: credence-governor-claude-code
plugins.description: PreToolUse hook that Bayesian-governs Claude Code tool calls (proceed/block/ask) via the credence-governor daemon. Requires the credence-governor daemon on :8787; fails open (silent no-op) if down. Start it: credence-governor-daemon.
